summary: Frontend navigation testing complete for Members menu navigation fix. All 7 features tested and working correctly: clicking member name navigates to /members/{id}/profile, profile page shows 5 tabs (Identidade, Familiares, Biométricos, Desportivo, Equipamento), 'Ver Estatísticas' button navigates to /players/{id}, 'Guardar' button present for admin/coach, dropdown 'Ver Perfil' navigates to /members/{id}/profile, dropdown 'Ver Estatísticas' navigates to /players/{id}, and 'Voltar aos Membros' button navigates back to /members.

member_name_click_navigation.description: Clicking on member name in Members list navigates to /members/{id}/profile

member_profile_page_tabs.description: All 5 personal data tabs present and accessible

ver_estatisticas_button.description: 'Ver Estatísticas' button on profile page navigates to /players/{id}

guardar_button.description: 'Guardar' button present for admin/coach to save profile changes

dropdown_ver_perfil.description: Dropdown menu 'Ver Perfil' option navigates to /members/{id}/profile

dropdown_ver_estatisticas.description: Dropdown menu 'Ver Estatísticas' option navigates to /players/{id}

voltar_aos_membros_button.description: 'Voltar aos Membros' button navigates back to /members

critical_code_review_comments: Members.jsx correctly links member names to /members/{id}/profile (line 711-717)
Members.jsx dropdown 'Ver Perfil' correctly links to /members/{id}/profile (line 768-773)
Members.jsx dropdown 'Ver Estatísticas' correctly links to /players/{id} (line 774-779)
MemberProfilePage.jsx correctly implements 5 tabs for personal data editing
MemberProfilePage.jsx 'Ver Estatísticas' button correctly navigates to /players/{memberId}
MemberProfilePage.jsx 'Voltar aos Membros' button correctly navigates to /members
context_for_next_testing_agent: Members navigation fix fully tested. Clicking member name goes to profile page (/members/{id}/profile) not statistics. Dropdown has 'Ver Perfil' (profile) and 'Ver Estatísticas' (statistics) options. Profile page has 5 tabs and 'Ver Estatísticas' button to navigate to player statistics. All navigation flows working correctly.
